Edge Cases Workshop

Case study coming soon. Facilitating a cross-functional workshop to surface and resolve product edge cases.

PixiEditor Website

· June 2025

Drove a major release launch for an editor with 200k+ users. I owned content strategy, video production, and Figma designs for the full site redesign — then shipped it in direct collaboration with the engineering team.

PixiEditor Extension Store

· TBD

Case study coming soon. Designing a discoverable marketplace for community-built PixiEditor extensions.

Rekord24

· TBD

Case study coming soon. Designing an app that lets users handle administrative matters online.

Mubu — Your Wellness Buddy

· October 2024

3rd place; fully playable prototype delivered in 24 hours. Mubu is a gamified wellness app that turns journaling, breathing, and mood tracking into quick, accessible micro-habits for everyday emotional well-being.

Apteczka na Szlaku

· September 2024

3rd place; designed for a real Polish mountain-safety initiative. Apteczka na Szlaku digitises trailside First Aid Kits to reduce theft and track usage — I delivered the full UX from brief to prototype in a single sprint.

Humi

· TBD

Case study coming soon. Designing a desktop app for Humi.
